title: Nigerian Military Runs a Fulani ‘Concentration Camp,’ Group Says
summary_full: Amnesty International said about 1,500 people have been detained by the military for three months and that many of those who have died from disease and starvation have been children.
summary_public: Amnesty International said about 1,500 people have been detained by the military for three months and that many of those who have died from disease and starvation have been children.
